_comment: The mutate list holds only files that unit/property tests genuinely exercise.
It used to list files no test imported at all (McpToolCallParser, McpToolSchema,
PhaseStrataRouter, PhaseWeightedRewarder). 78% of mutants had no coverage, so the
score measured how much code was untested rather than how good the tests were.
Also dropped after measuring: EventPayloadSchema.ts (753 of 863 mutants unreached) and
MxfMemoryManager.ts (533 of 696) — imported by a test but barely executed; and
TaskTypes.ts, which is types-only and yields no mutants. Add them back when they have
packageManager is deliberately absent: Stryker only accepts npm|yarn|pnpm and this repo
has a bun lockfile only. Every plugin is already in devDependencies, so Stryker never
thresholds.break is a real gate, set just under the measured score. Raise it when the
score improves; do not lower it to make a red run pass.
